title: Care for weaner pigs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Care for weaner pigs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare accommodation for weaners

pcs.text: Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing tasks.

pcs.text: Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks and conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks and conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks and conditions.

pcs.text: Select, clean and/or disinfect and prepare accommodation for weaner pigs according to pig, safety and security requirements and enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, clean and/or disinfect and prepare accommodation for weaner pigs according to pig, safety and security requirements and enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, clean and/or disinfect and prepare accommodation for weaner pigs according to pig, safety and security requirements and enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Check and/or adjust temperature, ventilation, humidity and other environmental conditions to meet pig needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and/or adjust temperature, ventilation, humidity and other environmental conditions to meet pig needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and/or adjust temperature, ventilation, humidity and other environmental conditions to meet pig needs.

pcs.text: Check and prepare feeders and drinkers according to manufacturer instructions and/or enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and prepare feeders and drinkers according to manufacturer instructions and/or enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and prepare feeders and drinkers according to manufacturer instructions and/or enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Resolve, record and report issues according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Resolve, record and report issues according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Resolve, record and report issues according to enterprise procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare accommodation for weaners

elements.title: Carry out weaner pig operations

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to weaner pig operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to weaner pig operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to weaner pig operations.

pcs.text: Select and fit PPE according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit PPE according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit PPE according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Group pigs into viable groups to achieve optimal productivity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Group pigs into viable groups to achieve optimal productivity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Group pigs into viable groups to achieve optimal productivity.

pcs.text: Provide water and feed according to established feeding plan and schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide water and feed according to established feeding plan and schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide water and feed according to established feeding plan and schedule.

pcs.text: Monitor pig behaviour, welfare and health daily, and action and/or report issues according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor pig behaviour, welfare and health daily, and action and/or report issues according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor pig behaviour, welfare and health daily, and action and/or report issues according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Apply and record treatments to pigs according to Farm Treatment Plan or Approved Medication List, using safe manual handling and low stress animal handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply and record treatments to pigs according to Farm Treatment Plan or Approved Medication List, using safe manual handling and low stress animal handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply and record treatments to pigs according to Farm Treatment Plan or Approved Medication List, using safe manual handling and low stress animal handling techniques.

pcs.text: Report abnormal or unexpected mortalities as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report abnormal or unexpected mortalities as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report abnormal or unexpected mortalities as required.

pcs.text: Remove dead pigs, and record according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove dead pigs, and record according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove dead pigs, and record according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out weaner pig operations

elements.title: Transition weaners to grower or other facility

pcs.text: Identify pigs that are ready for transition to grower facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify pigs that are ready for transition to grower facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pigs that are ready for transition to grower facilities.

pcs.text: Separate pigs not fit to load, and take appropriate actions according to enterprise policy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Separate pigs not fit to load, and take appropriate actions according to enterprise policy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Separate pigs not fit to load, and take appropriate actions according to enterprise policy.

pcs.text: Complete documentation according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete documentation according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete documentation according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Move pigs to grower facility or load onto transport vehicle as required, using safe and low stress handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move pigs to grower facility or load onto transport vehicle as required, using safe and low stress handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move pigs to grower facility or load onto transport vehicle as required, using safe and low stress handling techniques.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Transition weaners to grower or other facility

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
